# nomad_allocations (Data Source)

Retrieve a list of allocations from Nomad.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_allocations" "example" {
  filter = "JobID == \"example\""
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (String) Specifies the expression used to filter the results.
- `namespace` (String) Specifies the namespace to search for allocations in.
- `prefix` (String) Specifies a string to filter node pools based on a name prefix.

### Read-Only

- `allocations` (List of Object) List of node pools returned (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--allocations))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--allocations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `allocations`

Read-Only:

- `client_status` (String)
- `create_index` (Number)
- `create_time` (Number)
- `desired_status` (String)
- `eval_id` (String)
- `followup_eval_id` (String)

- `job_id` (String)
- `job_type` (String)
- `job_version` (Number)
- `modify_index` (Number)
- `modify_time` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `namespace` (String)
- `next_allocation` (String)
- `node_id` (String)
- `node_name` (String)
- `preempted_by_allocation` (String)
- `task_group` (String)
